title: RunExternalComfortCommand
description: RunExternalComfortCommand: Command that when executed with the LadybugTools Adapter, runs an External Comfort simulation and returns an ExternalComfort object containing results.

EPWFile.description: The path to an EPW file. FileSettings: The fileSettings, file name and directory, to use with an adapter for push and pull

SimulationResult.description: A SimulationResult object generated by the RunSimulation Execute command.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
